⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ST
You sent an attachment.
💌 ARIES- Don't forget yourself while you're out there loving & looking for love. When you make your well-being a priority, you'll naturally attract those beautiful, fulfilling connections. TAURUS- Not every person or situation is a red flag. Let love flow naturally. Clarity often comes from the heart, not just the mind. Trust the beautiful chaos of emotions & stay open. GEMINI- Love wants you out of that comfy spot. Your heart is ready for a bit more excitement. Step outside that familiar bubble, it might just lead you to an unexpected connection. CANCER- Ever wondered if you'll be single forever? Not a chance. You're meant to share your world, to find that special someone. Open up, let others in, & watch how love finds its way. LEO- Those sleepless nights, the anxiety, & stress, all gone! Your love life will be peaceful. Kick out whatever caused that stress, & get to watch your worries fade away. VIRGO- Remember that feeling of being in a dating desert with no potential suitors? Brace yourself because your love life will get a vibrant upgrade, & the choices ahead are yours for the taking. LIBRA- Remember feeling tired of failed love? Good news: your loving heart will succeed, leading you to a fulfilling relationship without any battles. SCORPIO- That pain and heartache you've been through? It'll subside, & you'll heal. Try opening your heart again. You'll step into a chapter where joy overcomes sorrow. SAGITTARIUS- No settling for less. Speak up for your needs. Your perseverance will lead you to the right person, & timings will be on your side. CAPRICORN- Don't let emotions drown you. Time to find balance. Navigate love with a steady hand, & you'll find a path where emotions flow harmoniously. AQUARIUS - Ever dreamt of a home, family, kids & pure joy? It's all meant for you. Keep nurturing your connections, celebrate the love that surrounds you. PISCES- Not everything has to be perfect or happen on schedule. Delays happen, but they don't mean your happy ending won't come. Embrace the parts of your love story that are still unfolding. Drop a ❤️ to claim. These messages aim to inspire. Skip, if they don't resonate. DM for 1:1 consultation 💌

You sent an attachment.
Self made actress ✨ Mouni Roy was born in cooch Behar West Bengal on 28 September 1985 into a Rajbongshi family. She did her schooling till class 12th from kendriya vidyalaya in Baburhat, coach Bihar and then went to Delhi. She took a mass communication at Jamia Mila Islamia at her parents insistence,but left the course midway and went to Mumbai to try her luck in the Hindi film industry. Mouni had an interest in acting since her childhood and cited actresses Madhubala, Madhuri Dixit, and Wahida Rahman as her acting idols. She made her acting debut in 2006, with the TV shows kyunki saas bhi kabhi Bahu thi. She participated and won the first season of Zara Nachke Dikha. In 2011,she starred in the Punjabi film Hero Hitler in Love. She attained fame after portraying "sati" in mythological serial "Devon ke Dev Mahadev". In 2015 she returned to the television with "Naagin" this series top the TRP charts. In 2018, she made her Bollywood debut alongside with "Akshay Kumar" in Gold. She followed the success of gold with an item number named "Gali Gali" in the hindi version of k.G.F chapter 1. Her performance in the film earned her the IIFA award for Best Supporting Actress and nomination for the Filmfare award for Best Supporting Actress. In 2022, she played the main antagonist "Junoon" in Brahmastra part-1. She has established herself as one of the most popular and Highest paid TV actress in India. In 2023, she made her web debut with Mila luthria's Sultan of Delhi. Despite many struggle she has improved her acting skills and hard working nature made a successful actresss in Indian film industry. #mouniroy #naagin #trending #mon #instagood #instadaily #woman #explorepage #reels #younique #instagram #style #instaphoto #foryou #mumbai #mounians #mouniroyfans #instastyle #vibes #model #mouniroyfans #imouniroy #india #instapic #fashionmodel #photooftheday #beautiful #art #photography #happy

You sent an attachment.
He destroyed you in 2023, don’t think about him in 2024.💔 Imagine this January, starting your year with an empty suitcase instead of an empty jar. 🧳✈️ Why not make a resolution to fill it with incredible travel adventures? 🌍🌟 In the travel niche, every week becomes an opportunity to add a note of a fantastic experience. Whether it’s exploring a new city, savoring exotic cuisines, or making new friends on the road, your travel jar will overflow with memories worth cherishing. 📝🌆 As the year unfolds, each journey becomes a chapter in your travel diary. 📖✨ Whether it’s a tranquil holiday by the beach or an adrenaline-pumping adventure in the mountains, every trip adds a unique flavor to your life. 🌴❄️ On New Year’s Eve, instead of opening an ordinary jar, you’ll unzip your suitcase and reminisce about the incredible year you’ve had. 🥂✨ The best part? Your travel adventures are not just notes on paper; they are etched in your heart, enriching your life with passion and wanderlust. 🌟❤️ So, this year, let’s replace that empty jar with a suitcase and embark on a journey of a lifetime. Pack your dreams, courage, and a sense of adventure, and let’s make 2024 a year filled with unforgettable travel experiences! 🌏🌄 #travel #passion #explore #passport #dontgiveup #workforit #nyc #newyork #life #exploretheworld #sunset #beautiful #grandma #grandpa #quote #Germany #europe #paris #london #canada #toronto #woman #breakup 🌆🌊🗻🌍🌟

You sent an attachment.
10 red flags in a woman: 1. Lack of Communication : Not open about feelings or thoughts. 2. Dishonesty : Telling lies, even small ones. 3. Controlling Behaviour : Trying to dictate your actions or choices. 4. Disrespectful to Others : Rude or unkind to people around her. 5. Unmanaged Anger Issues : Frequent overreactions or aggression. 6. Dependency : Over-reliance on you for various aspects of her life. 7. Lack of Trust : Unfounded jealousy or suspicion. 8. Disregard for Boundaries : Ignoring your personal limits. 9. Constant Criticism : Regular negative comments about you. 10. Inconsistent Values : Major differences in core beliefs or life goals. Are we missing any red flag? Let us know in comments 👇

🔥COMMENT ‘YES’ if you agree! A wise man pointed out something fascinating: ‘Cry’ has 3 letters, but so does ‘Joy’. ‘Hate’ has 4 letters, but so does ‘Love’. ‘Lying’ has 5 letters, but so does ‘Truth’. ‘Failure’ has 7 letters, but so does ‘Success’. ‘Enemies’ has 7 letters, but so does ‘Friends’. ‘Negativity’ has 10 letters, but so does ‘Positivity’. This isn’t just clever wordplay; it’s a powerful lesson in perspective. 🌟 In every aspect of life, career, and business, we face a choice. We can dwell on the negatives or embrace the positives. Will you choose ‘Cry’ or ‘Joy’? Will you let ‘Hate’ consume you, or will you spread ‘Love’? Will you hide behind ‘Lying’ or stand strong in ‘Truth’? Will you be defined by your ‘Failures’ or your ‘Successes’? Will you focus on ‘Enemies’ or cherish your ‘Friends’? Will you let ‘Negativity’ drain you, or will you be fueled by ‘Positivity’? 🚀 Every word, every emotion, every experience has two sides. Life is indeed two-sided. The question is, which side are you choosing? 💪 So, let’s make a stand! Drop a ‘YES’ in the comments if you’re committed to choosing the better side of life. Let’s embrace the joy, love, truth, success, friends, and positivity that life has to offer. 🙌 Remember, the words you choose to focus on shape your reality. Choose the words that uplift, inspire, and move you forward. Let’s create a life filled with positivity and success, together! 🌈 📌SAVE THIS POST FOR YOUR REMINDER #lifequotes #positivity #perspective #successmindset #womeninbusiness #empowerment #lifechoices #mindsetmatters #womenempowerment #womenempoweringwomen #womenentrepreneurs #womenpower

In winter’s grip, love fades away, Leaving echoes of a colder day. New faces pass, a fleeting glance, Yet love’s absence, a lingering trance. Snowy paths tell tales untold, Of love that withers, grows cold. Though new warmth may briefly appear, The heart still aches, a crystal tear. Winter’s whisper, a somber rhyme, Of love that fades with frozen time. Yet in the frost, a chance to find, A love that blooms, a warmer kind. ~ kartik Tags : [husn, anuv Jain, music, poem, literature, cinematic, landscape, iphone] #iphone #cinematic #poem #words #anuvjain #husn

You sent an attachment.
Whether you call it God, the creator, or the universe, let me share something with you: I’ve never felt truly heard in my life. Trust me, we all reach a point where we break down just to be heard, and I’ve been there. I may not know if there’s a higher power, but I believe someone is always listening. I found myself in a tough situation, praying for change. Did it happen? No. Am I the same person? Definitely not. Challenges taught me resilience. Life’s not easy; it’s like God, the creator, energy, or the universe whatever you believe is throwing us into a mess to learn how to cope. But remember, there’s always an opportunity in every situation. Swathi #thoughts #motivation #viralreels #fyp #writer

As the boat glides through tranquil waters, the bird's flight takes an unexpected turn as it hovers effortlessly, displaying an incredible sense of balance and grace. The bond between a woman and a bird reminds us of the enchanting beauty that surrounds us. You sent an attachment.
Cell Division in Animal cell. In this video, normal pig kidney (LLC-PK1 line) epithelial cells labeled with mEmerald fluorescent protein fused to microtubule EB3 (a protein that binds to the positive ends of microtubules) and mCherry fused to human histone H2B (highlighting the chromosomes) are visualized undergoing mitosis in laser scanning confocal microscopy. Perhaps the most recognizable phase of mitosis is termed metaphase, a stage where the chromosomes, attached to the kinetochore microtubules, begin to align in a single plane (known as the metaphase plate) midway between the spindle poles. The kinetochore microtubules exert tension on the chromosomes, which move back and forth in rapid erratic motion as a result, and the entire spindle-chromosome complex is now ready for the next event, separation of the daughter chromatids. Metaphase, one of the most critical stages in mitosis, occupies a substantial portion of the division cycle. Source/credit- https://www.microscopyu.com/gallery-images/mitosis-in -pig-kidney-epithelial-cells Repost - @biotech.symposium
